news-global-econ.title: Campbell's rolls out new soups, including first-ever gluten-free chicken noodle variety
news-global-econ.description: Campbell's launches its first gluten-free condensed chicken noodle soup in 150 years, partnering with Banza chickpea pasta for the new variety.

news-global-econ.title: Actor Misha Collins ‘Deeply Ashamed’ of America During Pride Month: Trans Rights Should Be ‘Conservative Rallying Call’
news-global-econ.description: 'Supernatural' star Misha Collins says he cannot understand why Republicans have not made "transgender rights" a "conservative rally call."

news-global-econ.title: Big tech stock buybacks vanish as AI spending spree eats up cash
news-global-econ.description: Big tech's stock buybacks decline as companies prioritize AI investments, shifting from capital-light to capital-intensive strategies.

news-global-econ.title: Trump says Iran deal 'probably is unconditional surrender,' reveals details of covert maritime operation
news-global-econ.description: Trump claims the U.S.-Iran deal is 'unconditional surrender,' says covert Navy operations destroyed 159 Iranian ships over nearly two months.

news-global-soc.title: This is the USA's roadmap to winning the World Cup now that they've made the knockout round
news-global-soc.description: The USMNT won its first two 2026 FIFA World Cup matches for the first time since 1930, clinching first in Group D with a real path to win it all.

news-global-soc.title: Homeowner Reports Break-In Then Shoots, Kills Suspect
news-global-soc.description:
A homeowner called 911 to report a break-in at his home Friday morning, then shot and killed the suspect before police arrived. 
The post Homeowner Reports Break-In Then Shoots, Kills Suspect appeared first on Breitbart.
